title: RF elements AS-3-17HV - Array Sector Antenna, 3 GHz, 17dBi
description: Array Sector 3-17HV dualpolarization antenna from RF Elements operating in the 3 GHz frequency band (3400 - 3800 MHz) with a gain of 17 dBi and a beam angle 118° . An important element built into the antenna structure is the so-called Backshield , which is a frequency reflector built into the antenna structure designed to reduce lateral lobes and back radiation The Array Sector 3-17 sector antenna is compatible with units from Ubiquiti thanks to the Rocket kit - Rocket M3 and Rocket M365 Antennas Mast holder (clamps, screws) Transmitter cover
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 1,6 F/B ratio [dB] 30 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 30 Wireless frequency 3.5 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 9 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 118 Antenna type Sector Antenna gain [dBi] 17 Connectors and Interfaces Rocket kit Yes RF connectors (2) RSMA male
